description: CC0 PBR ground texture sets for the terrain material system. Sourced from ambientCG (https://ambientcg.com), downloaded 2026-07-19 at 2K resolution (JPG variant), converted to PNG at 2048x2048. Color and NormalGL (OpenGL-convention tangent-space normal, +Y up) maps only; Roughness/AO/Displacement remain in the source zips if needed later.
license: CC0 1.0 Universal (verified on each asset page: 'free to use without attribution - even in commercial circumstances')

grass.material: Short dense fresh green lawn (procedural PBR), ~1.4 m x 1.4 m coverage

rock.material: Dark grey/black stone, cave/cliff surface (procedural PBR)

sand.material: Light sandy beach ground (tags: Beach, Dirt, Ground, Sand, White)
